label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. There are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has a partner at the start. The partners are: - Alice with Lola - Bob with Izzi - Claire with Sam - Dave with Patrick - Eve with Karl Then there are a series of partner swaps. Let me track each step carefully. First swap: Claire and Bob switch partners. So Claire's original partner is Sam, and Bob's is Izzi. After swapping, Claire will be with Izzi, and Bob will be with Sam. So after first swap: - Alice: Lola - Bob: Sam - Claire: Izzi - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Second swap: Claire and Alice switch partners. Claire is currently with Izzi, and Alice is with Lola. After swapping, Claire will have Lola, and Alice will have Izzi. Now: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Sam - Claire: Lola - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Third swap: Bob and Claire switch partners. Bob is with Sam, Claire is with Lola. After swap: Bob has Lola, Claire has Sam. Now: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Lola - Claire: Sam - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Fourth swap: Eve and Bob switch partners. Eve has Karl, Bob has Lola. After swap: Eve has Lola, Bob has Karl. Now: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Karl - Claire: Sam - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Lola Fifth swap: Dave and Claire switch partners. Dave is with Patrick, Claire is with Sam. After swap: Dave has Sam, Claire has Patrick. Final partners: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Sam - Eve: Lola So the question is asking who Claire is dancing with at the end. According to this, Claire is with Patrick. Let me double-check my steps to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First swap: Claire (Sam) and Bob (Izzi) switch → Claire: Izzi, Bob: Sam. Correct. Second swap: Claire (Izzi) and Alice (Lola) switch → Claire: Lola, Alice: Izzi. Correct. Third swap: Bob (Sam) and Claire (Lola) switch
